creator: kubito@gmail.com
text:
Beech Rintoul <beech@freebsd.org> writes:

> The current maintainer would like to pass the maintainership of this
> port to you. If this is acceptable, please reply and I'll make the
> change when I commit the update.

I'm fine with it, as we had already agreed on that via private mail.

This probably applies to print/lyx-devel as well.

Cheers,
Raphael
